# Mattia Astori

> Mattia Astori is an investor, photographer, and explorer based in San Francisco. He is the founder of Astori Ventures, a private investment firm focused on secondaries and co-investments in private companies.

## About

- Name: Mattia Astori
- Location: San Francisco, CA
- Website: https://mattiaastori.com
- Investment firm: https://astori.vc
- Documentary project: https://sacratos.com
- Email: mattia@astori.vc

## Professional

- Founder of Astori Ventures (2025–present) — private investment firm providing late-stage liquidity and early-stage access in private companies through secondaries and co-investments
- Previously Head of Private Capital at Wefunder (2023–2025)
- Registered Representative of Alternative Markets LLC, member FINRA/SIPC (Series 7 and 63)
- $63M+ deployed across 315 investments including SpaceX, OpenAI, xAI, Anduril, Databricks, ElevenLabs, and Perplexity
- Co-invested alongside Benchmark, a16z, Sequoia, Founders Fund, Thrive Capital, and others
- 7 vintage portfolios of Y Combinator companies

## Photography & Documentary

- Co-creator of Sacratos (https://sacratos.com), a documentary photography project capturing hidden cultural events and dangerous festivals worldwide
- 115M+ views across platforms
- Featured on Wikipedia, Insta360, All About Photo
- Events documented: Feria Internacional de la Pirotecnia (Mexico), Vegetarian Festival (Thailand), Exploding Hammers (Mexico), Tinku de Macha (Bolivia), Banni Festival (India), Maut Ka Kuan (India)

## Links

- Astori Ventures: https://astori.vc
- Sacratos: https://sacratos.com
